title: Light Vanilla Bean Turkish Stir-fry
description: A light and healthy twist on a traditional Turkish dish featuring vanilla extract to enhance the flavor without added sugar. Perfect for a sick-day meal that's both bitter and comforting.

ingredients.name: Turkish seasoning blend (or salt & black pepper)

instructions: Place the chicken breast in a pressure cooker. Add red bell pepper, onion, minced garlic, and Turkish seasoning blend (or salt & black pepper). Pour in water or chicken broth.
Secure the lid of the pressure cooker and cook on high for 5 minutes. Release the steam using the quick release method to avoid overcooking.
Add vanilla extract before serving for an extra burst of flavor.
